title: Vendors
subtitle: Manage suppliers and set default categories
noVendorsDescription: Vendors are automatically detected when you sync bank transactions. You can also create vendors manually or from existing transactions.

form.newDescription: Create a new vendor to organize your expenses.
form.name: Name
form.taxIdDescription: For invoice matching and tax purposes.
form.defaultCategoryDescription: New expenses from this vendor will use this category.
form.deleteHasExpenses: This vendor has {count, plural, one {# linked expense} other {# linked expenses}}.
form.deleteReassign: You must reassign them before deleting, or merge this vendor with another.
form.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete {name}. This action cannot be undone.

merge.title: Merge Vendors
merge.description: Merge {count} vendors into one. All expenses will be reassigned to the target vendor.

suggestions.title: {count, plural, one {# merge suggestion} other {# merge suggestions}}
suggestions.subtitle: possible duplicate vendors detected

toasts.mergedDescription: {deletedCount, plural, one {# vendor} other {# vendors}} merged into {targetName}. {entriesReassigned, plural, one {# transaction} other {# transactions}} reassigned.

backfill.allAssigned: All transactions already have vendors assigned.
backfill.created: Created {count, plural, one {# vendor} other {# vendors}}
backfill.linked: {count, plural, one {# expense} other {# expenses}} linked to vendors.
backfill.linkedOnly: Linked {count, plural, one {# expense} other {# expenses}}
